summary: User-supplied Galaga alien motion/pulse video ingested as a durable sprite-motion reference for taxonomy, pulse cadence, and clean role-silhouette review.

video.sourceAuthority: user-supplied segmented Galaga alien movement reference

roleTaxonomy.label: Fighter
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Clean player silhouette, red/white/blue color placement, capture/rescue meaning, dual-fighter context.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract front, captured-red, and dual-fighter pulse/context crops.

roleTaxonomy.label: Bee
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Formation drone role, flank/wing pulse, small high-count enemy identity.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract closed/open pulse frames and score against Aurora bee-line cadence.

roleTaxonomy.label: Butterfly
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Red/white/blue block silhouette and leader-escort pulse identity.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract closed/open pulse frames and dive silhouette target.

roleTaxonomy.label: Boss
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Boss wing/body shape, open/closed pulse, capture-beam host context, two-hit target identity.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Replace polluted boss crop targets with clean pulse frames and damage-state placeholders.

roleTaxonomy.label: Scorpion
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Later-round morph target taxonomy and distinctive yellow/cyan/red silhouette.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract morph target front pose and any pulse frame available.

roleTaxonomy.label: Bosconian-style morph
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Later-round morph novelty role and green/yellow/red color grammar.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract front pose for role taxonomy and future morph scoring.

roleTaxonomy.label: Galaxian
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Later-round morph novelty and classic Galaxian callback silhouette.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract front pose and compare to Aurora specialty enemy families.

roleTaxonomy.label: Dragonfly
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Challenge-only alien identity and non-combat bonus-stage target shape.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract front pose and challenge-stage movement/pulse sample.

roleTaxonomy.label: Satellite
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Challenge-only alien identity, rotation-like silhouette, and late-stage novelty.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract front/rotation pulse sequence for challenge-stage scoring.

roleTaxonomy.label: Starship
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Challenge-only alien identity and large blue/red target silhouette.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract front pose and compare against Aurora challenge-mosquito/starship proxies.

roleTaxonomy.label: Tractor Beam
roleTaxonomy.referenceUse: Beam geometry and capture-state screen grammar.
roleTaxonomy.nextExtraction: Extract beam width sequence for capture lifecycle visual scoring.

conformanceRead: This artifact is stronger for human-readable taxonomy, pulse cadence, and clean silhouette targets than the currently polluted crop boxes in some rows. It should not replace source-sheet exact crops alone; it should validate and correct target crops, then seed temporal pulse/cadence scoring.
nextBestStep: Use the motion sheet to extract clean per-role pulse pairs for Bee, Butterfly, and Boss first; then regenerate the runtime-vs-target table so bad crop boxes cannot masquerade as sprite conformance evidence.
